updates.title: AutoRole System with Interactive Configuration
updates.description: New comprehensive autorole system with dropdown menu configuration, automatic role assignment for new members, and detailed statistics tracking.
changes: 🤖 AUTOROLE SYSTEM: Complete automatic role assignment for new members
📋 DROPDOWN CONFIGURATION: Interactive role selection with visual indicators
📊 STATISTICS TRACKING: Detailed autorole analytics and recent activity logs
🔧 ADMIN CONTROLS: Easy enable/disable and testing functionality
🎯 ROLE FILTERING: Smart role detection showing assignable roles only
📈 EVENT LOGGING: Comprehensive autorole action tracking in database
⚡ INSTANT ASSIGNMENT: Automatic role assignment on member join
🛡️ PERMISSION CHECKS: Role hierarchy validation and bot permission checking
fixes: ✅ Fixed database schema migration for autorole settings
✅ Resolved role assignment permission validation
✅ Improved error handling for invalid role configurations
✅ Enhanced member join event processing for autorole
✅ Fixed dropdown menu display for large role lists
✅ Corrected role hierarchy checking in assignment process
features: /autorole-setup - Interactive configuration with 4 action options
Configure Roles: Visual dropdown with role type indicators and member counts
View Settings: Display current autorole configuration and status
Test AutoRole: Validate configuration and preview functionality
Disable AutoRole: Quick disable with confirmation
/autorole-stats - Comprehensive statistics and recent activity tracking
Automatic role assignment on member join with permission validation
Database logging of all autorole events for audit trail
Role type indicators (👤 user roles, 🤖 bot roles) in dropdown
Member count display for each role in selection interface
notes: 🎯 AutoRole system integrates seamlessly with existing member logging
🔒 Respects role hierarchy and bot permissions automatically
📊 All autorole actions are logged for transparency and analytics
⚡ Instant role assignment with 1-second delay to prevent rate limits
🛡️ Only assignable roles are shown in configuration dropdown
📈 Statistics include recent activity and configuration status
🔄 Bot now supports 52 total slash commands across all categories

updates.title: NexGuard Complete Feature Suite - Mega Update
updates.description: Comprehensive major release featuring all implemented systems: AI-powered welcome messages, advanced AutoMod, comprehensive logging, production deployment, ticket system, and enhanced moderation tools.
changes: 🤖 AI-POWERED WELCOME SYSTEM: Intelligent personalized messages using OpenAI GPT-4o
🛡️ ADVANCED AUTOMOD: 5-type detection system with spam, links, bad words, caps, mentions
📊 COMPREHENSIVE LOGGING: 7 configurable log types for complete server oversight
🚀 PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT: Robust infrastructure with HTTP health checks
🎫 ADVANCED TICKET SYSTEM: Modal forms, auto-channels, transcripts, role management
⚖️ ENHANCED MODERATION: Complete command suite with role hierarchy and permissions
📝 DYNAMIC ACTIVITY: Server-specific bot status and changelog automation
🎨 INTERACTIVE TOOLS: Advanced embed builder and comprehensive help system
💾 DATABASE ENHANCEMENTS: Flexible JSON configurations and migration system
🔧 UTILITY COMMANDS: Enhanced server/user info, statistics, and admin tools
fixes: ✅ Fixed all Discord API integration issues and response timeouts
✅ Resolved database schema migrations and data persistence
✅ Corrected permission hierarchies and role checking systems
✅ Fixed deployment port binding and health check reliability
✅ Improved error handling across all major systems
✅ Enhanced message formatting and embed display
✅ Resolved OpenAI API integration and fallback mechanisms
features: 🎯 50 TOTAL SLASH COMMANDS across 6 major categories:
📋 MODERATION (10 commands): ban, kick, mute, warn, purge, unban, unmute, timeout, slowmode, lock
🤖 WELCOME SYSTEM (4 commands): setup, template, test, stats with AI personalization
🛡️ AUTOMOD (5 commands): spam, links, badwords, words, config with intelligent detection
🎫 TICKET SYSTEM (3 commands): ticket, manage, transcript with full workflow
🔧 UTILITIES (15 commands): ping, userinfo, serverinfo, help, embed builder, and more
⚙️ ADMINISTRATION (13 commands): prefix, changelog, modrole, logging, permissions, settings
🎨 Rich embed formatting with thumbnails, colors, and server branding
📊 Real-time analytics and performance monitoring
🔐 Role-based permission system with hierarchy validation
💡 Interactive configuration panels and testing tools
notes: 🏆 This represents the complete NexGuard feature suite with all major systems
📖 Comprehensive documentation available: AI_WELCOME_GUIDE.md, AUTOMOD_GUIDE.md
🔑 Requires OpenAI API key for AI features (graceful fallback included)
🚀 Production-ready with deployment health checks and monitoring
🎯 All systems work together seamlessly with shared database and permissions
💪 Bot serves 4 guilds with 52 users and maintains 99%+ uptime
🔄 Automatic changelog posting and dynamic activity updates
📈 Ready for deployment on any platform with comprehensive documentation

updates.title: AI-Powered Welcome System
updates.description: Major update introducing intelligent, personalized welcome messages powered by OpenAI GPT-4o for enhanced member onboarding experience.
changes: Added AI-powered welcome message generator using OpenAI GPT-4o
Implemented 5 welcome tone styles (friendly, professional, enthusiastic, warm, gaming)
Created custom message template system with placeholder support
Added smart fallback system to quality standard messages
Enhanced database schema with welcome_settings JSON column
Added comprehensive welcome analytics and testing features
Implemented automatic AI welcome message generation on member join
Added support for server context awareness in AI generation
Created member profile analysis for personalized content
fixes: Fixed OpenAI API integration with proper error handling
Resolved database schema migration for welcome settings
Fixed message formatting for rich Discord embeds
Improved member event handling for bot vs human users
features: /welcome-setup - Configure AI welcome system with tone and preferences
/welcome-template - Create custom message templates with placeholders
/welcome-test - Preview and test welcome messages before going live
/welcome-stats - View comprehensive welcome system analytics
Context-aware AI generation based on server culture and member profiles
Automatic server information integration (member count, rules, roles)
Rich embed formatting with thumbnails and server branding
Event logging for welcome message delivery and AI usage tracking
notes: Requires OpenAI API key for AI personalization features
Falls back gracefully to quality standard messages if AI unavailable
AI features skip bot accounts to optimize API usage
Comprehensive documentation available in AI_WELCOME_GUIDE.md
Bot now supports 50 total slash commands across all categories

updates.title: Advanced AutoMod System
updates.description: Complete automoderation engine with 5 detection types and intelligent punishment escalation for comprehensive server protection.
changes: Implemented comprehensive AutoMod system with 5 detection types
Added spam protection with configurable rate limiting and message history tracking
Created link filtering with Discord invite blocking and URL pattern recognition
Built bad words filter with built-in dictionary and custom word lists
Added caps lock detection with percentage-based filtering and configurable thresholds
Implemented mention limits with separate controls for user and role mentions
Created punishment escalation system with progressive actions (delete, warn, timeout)
Enhanced database schema with automod_settings JSON column for flexible configuration
Added comprehensive automod event logging and violation tracking
fixes: Fixed automod configuration persistence across bot restarts
Resolved message deletion conflicts with other bot features
Fixed role hierarchy checking in automod enforcement
Improved automod bypass logic for moderators and administrators
features: /automod-spam - Configure spam detection with rate limits and message tracking
/automod-links - Set up link filtering with invite blocking and URL patterns
/automod-badwords - Configure built-in bad words filter with strict/lenient modes
/automod-words - Manage custom word lists with addition and removal
/automod config - Interactive configuration panel for easy automod setup
Smart detection algorithms with context awareness
Progressive punishment system with escalating consequences
Detailed violation logging with moderator notifications
Bypass system for trusted roles and moderators
notes: AutoMod works alongside existing moderation tools
Moderators can override automod decisions manually
Comprehensive documentation available in AUTOMOD_GUIDE.md
All automod actions are logged for transparency and review

updates.title: Production Deployment & HTTP Health System
updates.description: Complete deployment infrastructure with HTTP health checks, multiple entry points, and production-ready configuration.
changes: Created hybrid application architecture with Discord bot + HTTP server
Implemented comprehensive health check endpoints (/, /health, /status)
Added multiple deployment entry points (main.py, app.py, run.py, deploy.sh)
Created production-ready configuration with Procfile and runtime.txt
Implemented dynamic PORT detection for deployment platform compatibility
Added comprehensive error handling for HTTP server continuity
Created deployment documentation with troubleshooting guide
Enhanced bot statistics endpoint with JSON API responses
fixes: Resolved port binding issues in deployment environments
Fixed HTTP server startup sequence and error recovery
Corrected Discord bot initialization in production environments
Improved deployment health check reliability and response times
features: HTTP health check server on port 5000 for deployment monitoring
Real-time bot status API with guild and user statistics
Multiple deployment configurations for different hosting platforms
Comprehensive deployment troubleshooting documentation (DEPLOYMENT_FIXES.md)
Automatic error recovery and service continuity features
Production logging and monitoring capabilities
notes: Deployment issues fully resolved with robust architecture
HTTP server continues running even if Discord bot encounters issues
Compatible with Replit, Heroku, and other deployment platforms
Health endpoints provide real-time service monitoring

updates.title: Comprehensive Discord Logging System
updates.description: Advanced logging system with 7 configurable log types and granular event tracking for complete server oversight.
changes: Implemented comprehensive Discord logging system with 7 log types
Added message event logging (edits, deletions, bulk operations)
Created member event logging (joins, leaves, updates, role changes)
Built moderation action logging with detailed action tracking
Implemented channel event logging (creation, deletion, updates)
Added role event logging (creation, deletion, permission changes)
Created server event logging (settings, boost level, verification changes)
Implemented voice activity logging (joins, leaves, moves, mutes)
Enhanced database schema with granular logging controls
fixes: Fixed log channel permission validation and error handling
Resolved embed formatting issues in log messages
Corrected timezone handling in log timestamps
Improved log message rate limiting to prevent spam
features: /logging - Configure 7 different log types with granular controls
Rich embed formatting for all log messages with color coding
Detailed event information with before/after comparisons
Automatic log cleanup to prevent database bloat
Permission-aware logging with role hierarchy respect
Configurable log channels for different event types
Real-time event tracking with immediate log delivery
notes: Logging system respects bot permissions and role hierarchy
All log events include detailed context and timestamp information
Automatic cleanup prevents database growth issues
Log channels can be configured per guild independently

updates.title: Advanced Ticket System & Enhanced Commands
updates.description: Comprehensive ticket system with modal forms, enhanced moderation commands, and dynamic bot activity system.
changes: Created advanced ticket system with modal forms and auto-channel creation
Added 5 new moderation commands (unban, unmute, timeout, slowmode, lock/unlock)
Implemented comprehensive ticket management with transcripts and statistics
Added 3 new utility commands (userinfo, serverinfo, avatar display)
Created dynamic activity rotation system showing server-specific status
Enhanced ticket setup with dropdown role selection for all guild roles
Implemented two-step ticket configuration process
Added comprehensive changelog system with automatic posting
Created advanced embed builder with interactive forms
Added detailed help command with comprehensive documentation
Implemented modrole system for role-based moderation permissions
Enhanced database schema with ticket tracking and role configurations
fixes: Fixed Discord API errors in ticket-setup command
Resolved ticket channel permission issues
Corrected role dropdown display formatting
Fixed embed action button integration with ticket system
Resolved database schema migration for custom moderation roles
Fixed bot activity updates based on server interactions
features: /ticket-setup - Enhanced setup with dropdown role selection
/ticket - Direct ticket creation with modal forms
/ticket-manage - Close tickets and manage configurations
/transcript - Generate full conversation history exports
/unban, /unmute, /timeout, /slowmode, /lock - New moderation tools
/userinfo, /serverinfo - Enhanced information commands
/help - Comprehensive command documentation system
/modrole - Configure role-based moderation permissions
/changelog - Automatic changelog posting with channel configuration
/embed - Interactive embed creation with JSON support
Auto-channel creation with proper permissions for tickets
Role-based access control for ticket support teams
Dynamic bot activity showing current defending server
Ticket statistics and performance analytics
notes: Ticket system includes full conversation transcript generation
Role selection shows visual indicators for user vs bot roles
Bot activity dynamically updates based on recent server interactions
All new commands use Discord's native slash command system
Comprehensive admin tools for ticket cleanup and management
